index.tagline: Multiplayer bingo with friends. Draw numbers, share the link, play together.
index.howItWorks.heading: How it works
index.howItWorks.step1: Host creates a room on the game board and shares the link.
index.howItWorks.step2: Friends open the link and join with their name.
index.howItWorks.step3: Play — host draws numbers, everyone marks their cards.
index.wizard.title: Host or join
index.wizard.body: Host a game to create a room and draw numbers, or join with a link from someone else.
index.lang.label: Language
join.title: Join a Bingabu game
join.hint.code: Ask the host for the 6-letter room code and enter it below.
join.hint.qr: Have a join QR from the host? Scan it.
join.qr.failLoad: QR scanner failed to load. Enter the room code above.
join.qr.noCamera: Camera required to scan. Enter the room code above instead.
spectator.heading: Watching the game
spectator.subtitle: Following the caller — you do not have a card.
spectator.error.missingRoom: Missing room. Go back to join.
spectator.error.needJoin: Enter the room from the join page first (password if required).
player.heading: Your card
player.error.hostSession: Could not verify host session. Use Join as player again from your host tab, or join the game with the room code.
player.booted.title: You were removed from the game
player.booted.body: The host removed you from the room.
bingo.banner.firstVisit.body: First time hosting? Set players, create the room if playing online, then Start the game and use DRAW to call numbers.
bingo.remote.heading: Playing with friends online?
bingo.remote.apiUnavailable: Remote play needs the API. Run npm run dev:api to enable it.
bingo.remote.subtitle: Create an online room to play with others. Optional if you're playing in person.
bingo.remote.howBody: Only the numbers you draw as host count for everyone. Players can only mark cells that match called numbers (plus the free space). If someone disconnects, they should re-open the same link on the same device to reclaim their seat.
bingo.remote.lockLabel: Block new players from taking empty slots
bingo.setup.whoPlayingSubtitle: Specify how many players. Use the advanced options below for names and quirks if you like.
bingo.setup.boardStyleAria: Board style for caller board and new players
bingo.setup.boardStyleHint: Same style for everyone unless you set a different one per player under Advanced participants settings. Changing this before the game starts resets per-player styles to match.
bingo.setup.participantNamesLabel: Player names (you can change these anytime)
bingo.displayKeySet.aria: Board style for caller board and new players
bingo.displayKeySet.hint: Same style for everyone unless you set a different one per player under Advanced participants settings. Changing this before the game starts resets per-player styles to match.
bingo.displayKeySet.label: Board style (caller board & default)
bingo.daub.heading: Number marking
bingo.daub.subtitle: How should numbers be marked on player cards?
bingo.daub.hintAuto: Numbers will color automatically when called.
bingo.daub.hintManual: Players tap to mark numbers when called.
bingo.remote.copyCodeTitle: Players enter this code on the join page to join your room.
bingo.remote.copyJoinTitle: Share this URL so players know where to go to enter the room code.
bingo.remote.copyLinkTitle: Share this link to let people join this room directly without entering a code.
bingo.remote.qrAlt: QR code to open the join page
bingo.remote.qrFallback: Use the link above if the QR does not load.
bingo.remote.passwordReminder: Room is protected — share the password with players.
bingo.remote.syncTitleDirty: Push current state (including daubs) to players so their cards update.
bingo.remote.syncTitleClean: No changes to sync; button enables when you change settings or after a draw.
bingo.remote.hostJoinTitle: Open your player card in a new tab while you host here.
bingo.remote.hostJoinTitlePlay: Open your player card in a new tab (same device). You stay on this page to call numbers.
bingo.remote.pushToPlayersTitle: Show players an indicator on numbers they should have marked.
bingo.playWizard.s1.title: Current number
bingo.playWizard.s1.body: The last number called appears here.
bingo.playWizard.s2.title: History
bingo.playWizard.s2.body: All called numbers are listed here.
bingo.playWizard.s3.title: Call numbers
bingo.playWizard.s3.body: Click DRAW (or Space / Right arrow) for the next number; Left arrow or Backspace to go back to the previous one.
bingo.playWizard.s4.title: Call sheet
bingo.playWizard.s4.body: This is your call sheet. Mark numbers as you call them.
bingo.playWizard.s5.title: Players' cards
bingo.playWizard.s5.body: Players' cards appear here. Ready? Click Done to start calling.
bingo.hostWizard.s1.title: Set players
bingo.hostWizard.s1.body: Set the number of players and add their names below.
bingo.hostWizard.s2.title: Create room
bingo.hostWizard.s2.body: To play with friends remotely, create a room. Optional if you're playing in person.
bingo.hostWizard.s3.title: Share
bingo.hostWizard.s3.body: Share the room code or link with players so they can join.
bingo.hostWizard.s4.title: Draw
bingo.hostWizard.s4.body: Click Start the game, then use DRAW to call numbers. Have fun!
bingo.controls.prevTitle: Previous number — Left arrow or Backspace
bingo.controls.drawTitle: Draw next number — Space or Right arrow
bingo.leaderboard.heading: Leaderboard
bingo.hostKeyMapping.title: How each player sees the last call
bingo.settings.heading: Settings & options
bingo.settings.manualDaub: Players mark their own numbers (no auto-coloring)
bingo.settings.hintFrame: Show hint on numbers to mark (manual daub)
bingo.settings.hintFrameAria: Show hint frame on numbers to mark
bingo.settings.naturalVariationAria: Natural variation in speed and pitch

bingo.participant.clearQuirksTitle: Clear Exclude and Prefer for this player
bingo.confirm.newGame: Start a new game? Current game will be lost.
bingo.alert.roomGone: Room no longer exists. Create a new room if needed.
bingo.alert.addPlayerFirst: Add at least one player in setup before joining as a player.
bingo.alert.slotsFull: All player slots are taken. Remove a player or add more participants in a new game.
bingo.alert.bootPlayer: Remove this player from the room?
bingo.confirm.createRoomAnyway: Set participants and start a new game first. Create room anyway with current setup?
bingo.confirm.goHome: End your current game and go home?
cards.heading: Print cards
cards.subtitle: Same cards as your current game
cards.printTitle: Print these cards (uses the browser print dialog)
cards.refreshTitle: Reload cards from the saved game in this browser
cards.backTitle: Return to the bingo host screen
cards.emptyHtml: No game in progress. Open the Bingabu game and start or load a game, then return here to print the same cards.
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro.p1: Bingabu is a browser-based bingo game you can play with friends. This policy explains how information is handled when you use a hosted Bingabu deployment (the "Service").
privacy.intro.p2: The Service does not require user accounts. If you run your own copy of the software, you are responsible for your instance and for any notices you give your users.
privacy.s1.title: Information we collect
privacy.s1.intro: We collect only what is needed to run games and protect the Service:
privacy.s1.li1: Room and game data. When a host creates an online room, we store room identifiers, optional room passwords (hashed), player display names, bingo card assignments, numbers called, and related game state so participants can join and play together.
privacy.s1.li2: Technical data. Hosting and API infrastructure may process IP addresses, user-agent strings, and request metadata for security, rate limiting, and abuse prevention (for example, limiting how often rooms or joins can be created from one address).
privacy.s1.li3: Diagnostics. If error reporting (such as Sentry) is enabled by the operator, error events and limited context may be sent to that provider to fix outages and bugs.
privacy.s1.li4: Locale and preferences. Your browser may store your chosen language for repeat visits. Translation overrides may be stored by the operator in configured backend storage.
privacy.s2.title: How we use information
privacy.s2.p1: We use this information to provide the Service (creating and joining rooms, synchronizing calls and card state), to enforce host choices (such as locking new players or ending a room), to improve reliability, and to comply with law where applicable.
privacy.s2.p2: We do not sell your personal information. We do not use it for behavioral advertising.
privacy.s3.title: Where data is stored and subprocessors
privacy.s3.p1: The Service is often deployed on Vercel with optional Redis (for example Upstash) for shared room state. Those providers process data on our behalf under their own terms and privacy policies. Fonts or other assets may be loaded from third parties (such as Google Fonts).
privacy.s3.p2: If you use Bingabu only offline or without calling our APIs, game data may remain in your browser and not be sent to our servers.
privacy.s4.title: Retention
privacy.s4.p1: Online room data persists until the room ends, expires, or is removed according to operator configuration. Rate-limit and operational logs may be kept for a limited period for security and debugging.
privacy.s4.p2: Abuse reports submitted through the report endpoint are stored for operator review when that feature is enabled.
privacy.s5.title: Your choices and rights
privacy.s5.p1: Depending on where you live, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict certain processing of personal data, or to object to processing. Because the Service has no accounts, requests are often tied to specific evidence (such as approximate time and room code) and may be limited where we cannot verify identity.
privacy.s5.p2: You can stop using the Service at any time, clear site data in your browser, and avoid sharing sensitive information in display names or messages.
privacy.s6.title: Children
privacy.s6.p1: Bingabu is not directed at children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from them. If you believe a child has provided personal data, contact the operator so it can be removed.
privacy.s7.title: International users
privacy.s7.p1: If you access the Service from outside the operator's country, your information may be transferred to and processed in other countries where providers operate.
privacy.s8.title: Changes to this policy
privacy.s8.p1: We may update this policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date will change when we do. Continued use after changes means you accept the revised policy.
privacy.s9.title: Contact
privacy.s9.p1: For privacy questions about a specific deployment of Bingabu, contact the person or organization that operates that deployment (for example via contact details they publish next to the app). Maintainers of this software are not necessarily the operator of every hosted instance.
privacy.footer.note: This policy is general information and is not legal advice. Consult qualified counsel for your situation.
terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.intro.p1: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Bingabu web application and related APIs (the "Service"). By using the Service, you agree to these Terms.
terms.intro.p2: If you do not agree, do not use the Service. The party that operates the deployment you use ("we", "us") may be a third party; for self-hosted instances, that operator sets the rules for their environment.
terms.s1.title: The Service
terms.s1.p1: Bingabu lets a host run a 75-ball bingo-style game and share a link so others can join with a room code, watch as a spectator, or play a digital card. Available features depend on configuration (for example Redis for multi-instance hosting).
terms.s2.title: Eligibility and acceptable use
terms.s2.p1: You may use the Service only for lawful purposes. You must not use it to harass, threaten, abuse, or harm others; to distribute malware; to attempt unauthorized access to systems or data; to overload or disrupt the Service; or to violate applicable law.
terms.s2.p2: Hosts are responsible for who they invite and for conduct in rooms they create. We may suspend or limit access if we reasonably believe these Terms or the law are being violated.
terms.s3.title: No accounts and user content
terms.s3.p1: The Service does not require accounts. Information you submit (such as display names or abuse reports) should not include sensitive personal data unless you choose to provide it. You are responsible for what you submit.
terms.s4.title: Prizes, gambling, and real-money play
terms.s4.p1: Bingabu is intended for casual entertainment. Operating games for stakes, prizes, or gambling where that is regulated or prohibited is your responsibility. The Service does not pay out prizes or operate regulated gambling on your behalf. Seek legal advice if you are unsure.
terms.s5.title: Disclaimers
terms.s5.p1: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, WHETHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.
terms.s5.p2: We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation, that rooms will persist for any particular time, or that outcomes will always be synchronized perfectly across devices and networks.
terms.s6.title: Limitation of liability
terms.s6.p1: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, THE OPERATOR AND ITS SUPPLIERS WILL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, OR GOODWILL, ARISING FROM YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE.
terms.s6.p2: Where liability cannot be excluded, total liability will be limited to the greater of amounts you paid to use the Service in the twelve months before the claim (if any) or fifty U.S. dollars (US$50), unless mandatory law requires otherwise.
terms.s7.title: Indemnity
terms.s7.p1: To the extent permitted by law, you agree to indemnify and hold harmless the operator from claims arising out of your use of the Service, your rooms, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of others' rights.
terms.s8.title: Software, hosting, and third parties
terms.s8.p1: Bingabu software may be available under an open-source license. Use of a particular hosted deployment is still subject to these Terms for that deployment. Third-party services (hosting, databases, fonts, error reporting) have their own terms.
terms.s9.title: Changes
terms.s9.p1: We may modify these Terms and will update the "Last updated" date. If changes are material, we may provide additional notice as required by law. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.s10.title: Governing law
terms.s10.p1: Unless a different agreement applies between you and the operator, these Terms are governed by the laws applicable to the operator of the deployment you use, without regard to conflict-of-law rules. Courts in that jurisdiction may have exclusive venue, except where mandatory consumer protection laws require otherwise.
terms.s11.title: Contact
terms.s11.p1: For questions about these Terms, contact the operator of the deployment you use using the contact information they provide.
terms.footer.note: These Terms are a practical template for casual use; have a qualified attorney review them before commercial or high-risk use.
